title: A Baronesa Transviada
writer: Chico Anysio, Watson Macedo, Ismar Porto
actors: Dercy Gonçalves, Humberto Catalano, Grande Otelo
plot: Manicurist finds out she's the daughter of a rich baroness, and inherits her fortune. Now, she'll have to fight her mother's parents, with help from some of her friends.
